title: 6723 - Regional Pricing Executive – Project Cargo & Heavy Transport
description:
Commercial Executive (Project Freight Forwarding)

5 days, 9am- 5.30pm

Salary: $4500- $5500

Address: UE Square, Singapore 239920 (Fort Canning)

Job summary:

The Commercial Executive plays a critical role in supporting the Business Development team by managing RFQ responses, optimizing procurement strategies, and serving as the lead function for handling daily commercial inquiries.

Key Responsibilities:

RFQ & Tender Management:

  • Lead the preparation and submission of RFQs, tenders, and commercial proposals.
  • Analyse client requirements and coordinate with internal teams to develop competitive solutions.

Procurement Strategy & Cost Optimization:

  • Source and negotiate with vendors, carriers, and subcontractors to secure favourable rates and terms.
  • Continuously review procurement processes to improve efficiency and cost competitiveness.

Commercial Support:

  • Act as the primary point of contact for daily commercial inquiries from clients and internal stakeholders.
  • Provide accurate pricing, service details, and commercial guidance to support sales activities.

Data Analysis & Reporting:

  • Maintain and update pricing databases, supplier performance records, and market rate benchmarks.
  • Prepare reports on RFQ success rates, procurement savings, and commercial performance metrics.

Collaboration:

  • Work closely with Business Development Managers, Operations, and Finance teams to ensure alignment on project requirements and profitability targets.
  • Support global offices with regional pricing and procurement insights when required.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business, or related field.
  • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in commercial or pricing roles within freight forwarding or project logistics.
  • Strong understanding of RFQ processes, procurement strategies, and vendor negotiations.
  • Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint) and ERP systems; experience with freight management tools is a plus.
  • Solid knowledge of international shipping terms (Incoterms), heavylift/ project cargo operations, and cost structures.




📲Interested candidates, please WhatsApp your resume to: +65 9642 0989 (Han)
📧 Or email your resume to: supreme.cc.han@gmail.com

👤Chaw Chiaw Han | R22106723🏢 The Supreme HR Advisory Pte Ltd | EA 14C7279
